metadata.description: X (Twitter) post snippets collected as OSINT sources for True Promise 4 waves

snippets.author: Grok
snippets.text: Here's the precise translation of the Persian text in the image (IRGC Public Relations Bulletin #9 from Operation True Promise): "Kheibar missiles maneuver: The great gates of fire reopen to the occupied lands. In the 4th wave of Operation True Promise 4 with Kheibar missiles, residents of the occupied territories are warned to immediately distance from all military bases, security centers, and government institutions and urgently leave the occupied lands. Strikes will target Zionist spy bases in Tel Aviv, military/security centers in holy Quds, and missile sites in occupied areas."

snippets.author: GlobalIntel
snippets.text: IRGC: 5th wave of True Promise 4 will hit the Indian Ocean

snippets.author: The Sentinel
snippets.text: BREAKING: #Iran's IRGC claims 5th wave of "Operation True Promise 4" executed: - 4 drones struck a #US ammunition ship (MSP class) at Jebel Ali port (UAE), causing explosion & power loss - US naval base in #Kuwait hit by 4 ballistic missiles + 12 drones; full infrastructure destruction & heavy US casualties reported - Fuel tanker (MST-class support ship) targeted by missiles in the Indian Ocean. Part of ongoing retaliation after recent US-Israel strikes on Iran.

snippets.author: GP
snippets.text: Urgent: What happened at #Jebel_Ali_Port was not an attack on the port itself, but on an enemy ship. During the 5th wave of Operation The True Promise 4 in the Indian Ocean, the MSP ship was targeted by 4 drones, hitting it and forcing it

snippets.author: Grok
snippets.text: Translation: IRGC Statement #4. In the 5th wave of Operation "True Promise 4": - MSP ammo ship for US vessels at Jebel Ali Port hit by 4 drones; fully disabled by damage/explosions. - US naval base in Abdullah Al-Mubarak, Kuwait struck by 4 ballistic missiles + 12 drones; main infrastructure destroyed, US deaths/injuries reported. - MST fuel support ship for US vessels in Indian Ocean hit by Qader-380 missiles. - Naval & air forces will continue operations vs enemy units. Summary: Iran claims major hits on US ships & Kuwait base in ongoing retaliation, with more attacks promised. (Per IRGC; unverified independently.)

snippets.author: styldirt8eta
snippets.text: The Revolutionary Guard: During the 5th wave of Operation True Promise 4 in the Indian Ocean, the MST vessel was targeted by 4 drones. The ship was damaged, forcing it out of service. Its mission was to transport ammunition to American ships in Jebel Ali port.

snippets.author: Abebe Samson
snippets.text: Trump thought that by killing Iran's Supreme Leader & murdering kids that Iran would capitulate! Meanwhile, the IRGC is on its 6th wave of Operation True Promise 4. Missiles and drones slammed 27 US bases, Tel Nof airbase, Tel Aviv military HQ, and a major Israeli defense complex

snippets.author: Zagazola
snippets.text: According to Fars, Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps has announced a new phase of retaliation: The 6th wave of Iran's "True Promise 4" operation is being carried out with missile and drone strikes. Targets included 27 US bases across the region, Israel's Tel Nof base, the IDF command in Hakirya, and a defense complex in Tel Aviv. The IRGC vowed it "will not let sirens fall silent in occupied territories or US bases" and promised a "different and difficult step of revenge"

snippets.author: Kingdom
snippets.text: IRGC has announced that, The 6th wave of Iran's Operation True Promise 4 is being carried out with missile and drone strikes. Targets included 27 US bases across the region, Israel's Tel Nof base, the IDF command in Hakirya, and a defense complex in Tel Aviv

snippets.author: VPol
snippets.text: The IRGC's Public Relations Office's announcement of the 8th wave of Operation True Promise 4 said that in "the continuation of attacks on hostile enemy naval targets, 3 US and British oil tankers were hit by missiles in the Persian Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz and are burning." IR.GC: 3 US and British oil tankers hit by Iranian missiles and are burning.

snippets.author: Ryan Rozbiani
snippets.text: JUST IN: Iran Updates on True Promise 4 Wave 7 and 8. Iran claims strikes on USS Abraham Lincoln, US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain, and Persian Gulf-region facilities. U.S. denies claims of strikes on USS Abraham Lincoln.

snippets.author: World Lens News
snippets.text: IRGC launches 9th wave of Operation True Promise 4. US Navy support ship struck ~700 km off Chabahar. Israel's THAAD radar in UAE destroyed. USS Abraham Lincoln hit by 4 cruise missiles, retreats SE Indian Ocean.

snippets.author: RusWar
snippets.text: More footage of an Iranian missile with separating warheads over central Israel. Earlier impacts reported in Haifa. IRGC announces this as the 9th wave of strikes in Operation "True Promise 4."

snippets.author: David Z
snippets.text: Cassette strikes: The IRGC has begun the 9th wave of Operation "True Promise 4" against Israel and the USA. The strikes are being carried out against "targets in the occupied territories" (in Israel) and American facilities in the region. In the video, a missile with a separating warhead falls on Israel. According to another version, missile debris is falling.

snippets.author: Nanana365
snippets.text: IRAN-ISRAEL: #Iran is calling on Israeli citizens to leave the country immediately. The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has announced the launch of the 10th wave of Operation True Promise 4, claiming to have used the #Kheibar missile for the first time.

snippets.author: Al Mayadeen English
snippets.text: #Iran's IRGC reported that it targeted Israeli PM Netanyahu's office during the 10th wave of Operation 'True Promise 4', adding that his fate is unknown.

snippets.author: RusWar
snippets.text: Saudi Aramco facility hit - oil prices expected to rise. Iran reported that this morning it conducted the 10th wave of strikes as part of Operation "True Promise 4" - the most powerful of all Iranian "True Promises" so far. The 10th wave included the use of "Khaibar" missiles. A new batch of missiles was also launched toward Israel.

snippets.author: Shah Faisal Afridi
snippets.text: Iran's Revolutionary Guards have launched their 10th wave of Operation True Promise using the Kheibar missile for the first time. They are urging all Israelis to evacuate immediately.

snippets.author: Ngirĩ | Web Developer
snippets.text: The 11th wave of "True Promise 4" was executed in a combined, extensive, and high-density action by the naval and aerospace units of the IRGC against American-Zionist military targets on the third day of the second army's aggression towards our beloved homeland. Information centres and American military support bases in the Persian Gulf, the communication industries complex of the Zionist regime's army in Beersheba, and more than 20 points in areas of Tel Aviv, West Jerusalem, and Galilee in the occupied territories were targeted. Since the start, the brave children of the Iranian Armed Forces have attacked 60 strategic targets and 500 military points, launched more than 700 drones and hundreds of missiles, and set a new record beyond the 12-day war in just the past 48 hours.

snippets.author: PumpMain
snippets.text: Iran's IRGC just launched its 11th wave "True Promise 4" - 700+ drones and hundreds of missiles striking US intelligence centers, Israeli strategic sites, and Gulf ports. Death toll now exceeds 780. Trump notified Congress of force adjustments without ground troops. Global oil spiked.

snippets.author: Jon Elmer
snippets.text: IRGC vs IDF in Beersheba: ballistic missile strike on Monday during the 11th wave of Operation True Promise 4; IRGC said target was IDF industrial communications complex in the city. The barrage targeted 20 sites across Israel. [2/3]

snippets.author: The Black Coffee Doctrine
snippets.text: The statement said the operation hit US intelligence centers and military support bases in the Persian Gulf, the communications industries complex in Beersheba, and over 20 points to include Tel Aviv, West Jerusalem, and Galilee. The armed forces, it stated, have so far struck 60 strategic and 500 military points and launched over 700 drones and hundreds of ballistic missiles, setting a new record beyond the entire 12-day war within just 48 hours. The statement warned that 'brutal and terrorist actions' against Iranian civilians, including hospitals, schools, and infrastructure will only strengthen resolve.

snippets.author: War Monitor
snippets.text: IRGC REPORT ON THE 11TH WAVE OF TRUE PROMISE 4: US intelligence centers and military support warehouses, and the communications industries complex of the Zionist regime's army are among the targets of the eleventh wave. The eleventh wave of the Operation True Promise 4 was carried out in a combined, extensive, and high-density action by the naval and aerospace units of the IRGC against American-Zionist military targets on the third day of the enemies' aggression against our beloved homeland. US intelligence centers and military support warehouses in the Persian Gulf region, the communications industries complex of the Zionist regime's army in Beersheba, and more than 20 points in the areas of Tel Aviv, West Jerusalem, and the Galilee in the occupied territories were targeted and hit by Iranian missiles and drones. From the beginning of the war until now, the brave children of the Iranian Armed Forces, by attacking 60 strategic targets and 500 military points of the USA and the Zionist regime, and by launching more than 700 drones and hundreds of missiles, and defeating the enemies in interception, have set a new record beyond the entire 12-day war in just the last 48 hours in the war against the aggressive enemies. The 12th wave is already in progress.

snippets.author: durgeshkdubey
snippets.text: Latest Iranian barrage: Over 700 drones and hundreds of missiles target US and Israeli forces. The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has announced the 11th wave of its True Promise Four operation: a combined, large-scale strike by the IRGC's navy and air force targeting US and Israeli bases on the third day of the war on Iran. US information centers and supply depots in the Persian Gulf, the Israeli army communications network in Be'er Sheva and over 20 targets in Tel Aviv, West Jerusalem and Galilee were hit. Since the start of the war on Saturday, Iranian forces have attacked 60 strategic targets and 500 US and Israeli positions, launching over 700 drones and hundreds of missiles - surpassing the number during last year's 12-day war in just the last 48 hours. The IRGC said the brutal US and Israeli attacks against defenseless Iranian civilians - including attacks on hospitals, schools and civilian infrastructure - have only strengthened Iran's resolve to wage a total war against its enemies.

snippets.author: BDDIGEST
snippets.text: Iran's 12th wave of 'Operation True Promise 4' begins: Massive attacks on US-Israeli targets continue

snippets.author: Mr. Hass
snippets.text: BREAKING: Iran claims it launched a new-generation missile as part of the 12th wave of "True Promise 4" targeting enemy positions.

snippets.author: Grok
snippets.text: Confirmed. Iranian state media (ISNA footage released today via CGTN) shows the launch of a Fattah-2 hypersonic missile as part of IRGC's 12th wave of Operation True Promise 4. Multiple waves reported targeting Israeli/US sites; consistent with ongoing escalation since Feb 28.

snippets.author: TheOpinionDesk
snippets.text: #Breaking: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps says it has launched its next-generation Fattah-2 hypersonic missile as part of the 12th wave of "Operation True Promise 4," firing at enemy positions amid ongoing escalation. Videos of the launch are circulating online.

snippets.author: Joe Catron
snippets.text: IRGC Announces Launch of 13th Wave of "True Promise 4" Targeting US Base in Kuwait

snippets.author: Alireza Akbari
snippets.text: IRGC: The 13th wave of Operation True Promise 4 has begun. Arifjan Base in Kuwait targeted by IRGC drones.

snippets.author: SAHEL INFOS
snippets.text: The IRGC announces the start of the 13th wave of Operation True Promise 4. This wave is being conducted by the IRGC Navy's Drone Force, targeting the US Camp Arifjan base in Kuwait. The 12th wave targeted fixed and mobile US military assets in Kuwait, the United Arab Emirates,

snippets.author: Osint Radar
snippets.text: URGENT | UNCONFIRMED - Kuwait / Arifjan Base. Al-Alam reports the IRGC claims its naval drone unit launched the "13th wave" of Operation True Promise 4 targeting the U.S. Marine presence at Arifjan Base, Kuwait. No confirmation from U.S. DoD, Kuwaiti authorities, or independent monitoring channels at this time. Source note: Al Alam is a state-owned media corp as part of the Islamic Republic of Iran Broadcasting (IRIB).

snippets.author: Thomas Keith
snippets.text: The IRGC has released new footage of the Qader and Emad missiles used in strikes on the zionist entity and American bases across the region as part of the 14th wave of Operation True Promise 4.

snippets.author: Lev
snippets.text: The IRGC reported a missile and drone strike on a US airbase in Bahrain. "The 14th wave of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps' Operation True Promise 4 launched a massive drone and missile attack on the U.S. airbase in the Sheikh Isa area of Bahrain at dawn today

snippets.author: M. Selcuk Sumengen
snippets.text:
"Iran attacked a US airbase in Bahrain" (Russian, RIA Novosti). "During the 14th wave of Operation True Promise, the IRGC naval forces carried out a large-scale attack this morning using missiles and drones on the US airbase in the Sheikh Isa area..."

Ali Raza @ali_marketer1: Urgent IRGC: Destruction of the main command building and headquarters of the US airbase The 14th wave of Operation True Promise 4, a naval operation by the (IRGC), targeted the US airbase in the Sheikh Isa area of Bahrain early this morning in a large-scale drone and missile attack. In this attack, 20 drones and 3 missiles struck their intended targets, destroying the main command building and headquarters of the US airbase and setting its fuel tanks ablaze.

snippets.author: Thomas Keith
snippets.text: IRGC says the 14th wave of Operation True Promise 4 struck the American air base in the Sheikh Isa area of Bahrain at dawn, using 20 attack drones and 3 missiles. It reports that all munitions hit their intended targets, with the main command building and the headquarters of the base destroyed, and the fuel tanks igniting in a fire visible across the area.

snippets.author: dr.msm
snippets.text: Iranian Naval Forces Participate in 15th Wave of "True Promise 4". IRGC: Wave 15 of Operation True Promise 4 was executed using a combination of special operational actions by the naval force.

snippets.author: Al Mayadeen English
snippets.text: IRGC launches wave 15 of Operation True Promise 4, striking 10 targets in Sheikh Isa Air Base in Bahrain, as #Iran accuses Washington and Tel Aviv of targeting regional sites to frame Iran for attacks.

snippets.author: Aprajita Nafs Nefes
snippets.text: Statements from the IRGC and the armed forces in the past hours: The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps carried out the 15th wave of Operation True Promise 4 with the code "Ya Fatemeh Al-Zahra." The operation was executed by the IRGC Navy using a combination of special operational actions against US military targets in the region. Iranian projectiles struck 10 key and strategic command points and equipment complexes of US forces at Sheikh Isa Air Base in Bahrain. Targets included the US air command and control center at the base. Aircraft fuel storage tanks at the base were hit. Buildings housing senior US commanders at the base were struck. Field monitoring and satellite reconnaissance show that the base's infrastructure became completely non-operational. The operation resulted in a humanitarian crisis at the base. US personnel evacuated and fled from the base after the strikes. Direct hits were recorded on 10 strategic targets and facilities at Sheikh Isa Air Base. The IRGC Aerospace Force struck the second US TAD anti-missile defense system in West Asia with point-to-point missiles. The system was taken out of operational service.

snippets.author: Aprajita Nafs Nefes
snippets.text: The IRGC Aerospace Force struck the second US TAD anti-missile defense system in West Asia with point-to-point missiles. The system was taken out of operational service. The TAD radar at Al-Dhafra base in the UAE was destroyed a day earlier. With the destruction of these two systems, Iranian missiles gained a clearer path to hit targets. Positions of hostile anti-revolutionary militant groups in the Kurdistan Region of Iraq were destroyed in a targeted intelligence operation. The operation involved the launch of 30 drones against those positions. These groups had prepared infiltration and operations against Iran's borders. Six advanced Hermes drones were destroyed by Iranian air defense systems within 24 hours. The interceptions were carried out by the Khatam al-Anbiya Air Defense Base systems. The drones were shot down over Isfahan, Qasr-e Shirin, Tabriz, Khuzestan, and the Tehran area. Since the beginning of the war, 35 advanced enemy drones were destroyed. The drones included RQ-19, Heron, Hermes, Orbiter, and other unmanned aerial vehicles. These drones were downed by ground defense forces, Air Force fighter jets, and IRGC units.

snippets.author: Siben Nules
snippets.text: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps: Announcement No. 14 of the 15th wave of Operation True Promise 4 from the IRGC Public Relations: The 15th wave of Operation True Promise 4, with the code "Ya Fatima Al-Zahra," was powerfully executed with a combination of special operational actions by the IRGC Navy against targets of the hostile American army in the region. 10 key and strategic command points and equipment complexes of the American terrorists at Sheikh Isa Air Base in Bahrain were heavily struck by Iranian projectiles. The air command and control center of the American terrorists, aircraft fuel tanks, and the residence of high-ranking American commanders at this base were among the destroyed targets. Field intelligence and satellite monitoring indicate that all infrastructure at this base has become non-operational, a humanitarian crisis has occurred, and the American terrorists have fled from this base.

snippets.author: Aaron Hutchins
snippets.text: Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) claims their 15th wave of Operation True Promise-4 destroyed the U.S. air control & command center on Sheikh Isa Air Base in Bahrain. The IRGC also claims the base is on fire.

snippets.author: PFIFFIKUS
snippets.text: IRGC says the 15th wave of Operation True Promise 4, coded "Ya Fatima al-Zahra," struck the American Sheikh Isa Air Base in Bahrain with a coordinated naval operation, hitting 10 command and equipment complexes. It reports that the air command and control center, the residence of senior American commanders, and the base's fuel depots were destroyed, and that all infrastructure at the site has gone non-operational, with American forces fleeing the area.

snippets.author: CGTN America
snippets.text: From Sepehr Saremi in Tehran: IRGC: Wave 16 of Operation True Promise 4 has begun, launching mass missiles and drones toward the occupied territories.

snippets.author: teleSUR English
snippets.text: #FromTheSouth News Bits | Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps announced that the 16th wave of the True Promise IV operation was carried out with missile and drone attacks on Israeli territory.

snippets.author: SearchZx
snippets.text: The IRGC launched "Operation True Promise 4" on March 4, a massive 16th wave of missiles and drones targeting central Israel. The IDF confirmed "broad waves" of retaliatory strikes on Tehran in response #IranIsraelWar

snippets.author: Liberty 4 Palestine
snippets.text: URGENT. Statement No. 20. Details of Wave 17 / The Eyes of America and the Occupying Zionist Entity in the Region Are Closed. The following is stated in Statement No. 20 of Operation True Promise 4, issued by the Public Relations Office of the Iranian Revolutionary Guard Corps: In stage 17 of Operation True Promise 4, hypersonic missiles and space-based attack drones affiliated with the Iranian Revolutionary Guard Corps, bearing the symbolic name "Messenger of Allah, peace and blessings be upon him and his family," penetrated the American THAAD system and targeted strategic sites in the Zionist Ministry of Defense building and Ben Gurion Airport. With the successful destruction of more than 7 ultra-advanced radars, the eyes of America and the occupying Zionist entity in the region have been closed. The continuous blare of alarms and the prolonged confinement of residents in shelters throughout the occupied territories during the past 100 hours of war demonstrate the regular and organized rhythm of Iranian projectile launches aimed at exacting harsh revenge on the terrorist criminals. The cowardly forces and military facilities of the regime hide in civilian and public layers, but the discovery and targeting of the aggressors will continue, and they will be destroyed by force. In the coming days, the attacks will intensify and expand.

snippets.author: Thomas Keith
snippets.text: The IRGC reports that in Wave 17 of Operation True Promise 4, IRGC hypersonic missiles and attack drones under the codename "Rasul Allah" broke through the American THAAD shield and struck strategic targets inside the zionist Defense Ministry complex and Ben Gurion Airport. More than 7 advanced radars were destroyed, blinding America and the usurping zionist entity across the region. The nonstop sirens and the population locked in shelters for over 100 hours show the organized rhythm of Iranian missile fire and the depth of the retaliation being carried out. The enemy's troops and infrastructure are now hiding behind civilian layers, yet detection and precision targeting continue, and the aggressors will be crushed. The strikes will increase in scale in the coming days.

snippets.author: Geo-Politico News
snippets.text: True Promise 4 wave 17: IRGC smashes US radar in Qatar, hits destroyer

snippets.author: David Roth-Lindberg
snippets.text: Right now: Iran's IRGC: We launched 40 missiles towards the American and Israeli enemy targets as part of wave 17 of the "True Promise 4" operation. The israeli occupation army: The air force has launched a wave of extensive raids on targets of the Iranians in Tehran.

snippets.author: SaRkaar JoUn (Khamenei)
snippets.text: IRGC Public Relations: Wave 18 of Operation True Promise 4 began with the code name "O Hassan Ibn Ali (AS), peace be upon him."

snippets.author: Ayatollah Sayyid Jawad Naqvi
snippets.text: Footage shows the IRGC launching Ghadr-class ballistic missiles as Wave 18 of Operation True Promise 4 begins

snippets.author: Thomas Keith
snippets.text: IRGC says Wave 19 of True Promise 4 has begun, a joint missile and drone strike hitting the American-Zionist enemy deep in the occupied lands and U.S. bases in the region, launched under the call of O Hassan ibn Ali (AS).

snippets.author: Wompty
snippets.text: Wave 19 of Operation "True Promise 4" brought out Khorramshahr-4 heavy ballistic missiles, a medium-range missile developed by Iran with a large warhead estimated around 1,500 kg. The system was unveiled in 2023, representing the newest generation of the Khorramshahr missile family.
